title: ononis irritabilis f. ulcina
intro: Ononis irritabilis f. ulcina is a plant species known as a type of restharrow, which is a flowering plant belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The health benefits of Ononis irritabilis f. ulcina include soothing and healing skin conditions, such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health and wellness applications.
